---
title: "Privacy Policy"
description: What data is collected when you visit this site and how it is used.
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-title: "On this page"
---

_Last updated: 19 May 2026_

This privacy policy explains what data is collected when you visit alexandre.cagnon.com and how it is used.

## Hosting

This site is hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/). GitHub may collect technical information such as your IP address, browser type, and referring page as part of its standard server operations.

See [GitHub's privacy statement](https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement) for details.

## Analytics & Cookies

This site does not set up any first-party analytics tracking or cookies.

GitHub may do so - see [GitHub's privacy statement](https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-general-privacy-statement) for details.

## Third-party links

This site contains links to external websites. I am not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites. I encourage you to review the privacy policies of any external site you visit.

## International visitors

This GitHub Pages site is operated on GitHub's infrastructure. The exact physical server location is not publicly guaranteed as one specific place. If you are visiting from the European Economic Area or other regions with data protection laws, please be aware that your information may be transferred to and processed in the United States. By using this site, you acknowledge this transfer. I do not knowingly collect or process personal data that would be subject to GDPR, as no PII is collected.

## Contact

If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can reach me at [alexandre.cagnon.work@tuta.com](mailto:alexandre.cagnon.work@tuta.com).

## Changes to this policy

I may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by the "last updated" date at the top of this page.
